title: Serve card data in AP Note attachment
description: When serving a Note in the outbox or via AP, if a card exists for the post, include it as a PropertyValue or Link attachment in the Note object. Also: if/when Mastodon API is added, return card field in status responses.
close_reason: Done: delivery.rs adds card as 'preview' field on AP Note. get_card_for_post() returns Link object with name/summary/icon.
